subject: Young Macintosh from Disney/Pixar's Brave — a muscular young highlander in tartan kilt flexing one arm with a sword in his other hand
description: A young, muscular male figure poses confidently in a red-green tartan kilt, one arm raised in a bicep flex while the other hand holds a sword at his side. He wears blue-and-white wristbands and a brown leather strap across his chest. His expression is smug self-satisfaction. Long dark hair falls around his face. In the background, a second figure in similar highland dress is visible holding an axe, likely another Scottish lord's son. The composition communicates youthful arrogance and physical pride — the 'proud son' subtitle reads clear in his body language.
foreground: Muscular young man in tartan kilt flexing arm with sword at side
background: Atmospheric highland setting, second kilted figure with axe visible
